name: Rekor Systems, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Rekor is a roadway intelligence Company, working to modernize public safety, urban mobility, and transportation management through the development of cutting-edge solutions. By collaborating closely with public and private sector customers, we deliver mission-critical services and solutions that enable them to achieve their objectives effectively, while simultaneously building a new digital infrastructure operating system for roadways.
